annotation: Hybrid Union Silver Standard: has_entity=1 if Regex OR GLiNER detects entity. Covers structured template issues (Regex) and informal free-text issues (GLiNER).

recommendation.selection_reason: Macro F1 averaged across all 4 entity types. F1 chosen over precision because missing an entity (FN) is worse than a false positive — incomplete RL state is harder to recover from than a slightly noisy state.
recommendation.gap_note: Val Macro F1=0.8558  |  Test Macro F1=0.8634  |  Gap=0.0076  (stable)
recommendation.annotation: Hybrid Union Silver Standard: has_entity=1 if Regex OR GLiNER detects entity. Covers structured template issues (Regex) and informal free-text issues (GLiNER).
recommendation.rl_readiness: Entity flags (has_version, has_error_type, has_platform, has_hardware) are now in final_rl_dataset.csv. The RL agent uses these to understand how complete the ticket information is. entity_count=0 → likely needs clarification. entity_count=4 → fully specified → safe to route.
recommendation.next_step: Run entity_extractor.py --mode generate to write flags into CSVs, then proceed to missing_detector.py (Step 8).
